revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-1-020

The probability that a failure will be repaired within a specified time after the failure occurs. This is determined over a given period of time when maintenance of the item is performed in accordance with the prescribed procedures and resources.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Maintainability}}
